fields.name: Operator flags
fields.value:
`settings.manager_cog.enabled` — Settings menu (!settings) · default=True eff=on src=default
`youtube.context.enabled` — YouTube context for AI replies · default=False eff=off src=default

fields.name: Internal / platform gates
fields.value:
_Migration & kill-switch gates — not user-facing features._
`bindings.primary` — Bindings as primary source (internal rollout gate) · default=False eff=off src=default
`feature_flag.primary` — Feature-flag runtime gate (env-only, internal) · default=False eff=off src=default
`participation.enabled` — Participation runtime (internal rollout gate) · default=False eff=off src=default
`resource_provisioning.primary` — Resource provisioning pipeline primary (operator kill-switch) · default=False eff=off src=default
`resources.unified` — Unified resource discovery (internal rollout gate) · default=False eff=off src=default
`settings.mutation.primary` — Settings mutation pipeline primary (operator kill-switch) · default=False eff=off src=default
